note: AssetRipper GUI Free 1.3.x has no scripted export CLI. Export workflow: launch GUI, load Dofus data, click Export → dofus-app/data/external/assetripper-export/, then parser consumes the YAML. Headless mode (--headless) hosts a local web UI (port shown on stdout) but we don't yet have HTTP-driver code; treat the export as manual.
